title: taraxacum obnubilum
intro: Taraxacum obnubilum, also known as the dark dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb that grows up to 12 inches tall, with jagged leaves and yellow flowers that resemble the common dandelion. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum obnubilum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce oxidative stress in the body. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum obnubilum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
